{"version":3,"sources":["webpack://counterUp/webpack/universalModuleDefinition","webpack://counterUp/webpack/bootstrap","webpack://counterUp/./index.js"],"names":["root","factory","exports","module","define","amd","window","installedModules","__webpack_require__","moduleId","i","l","modules","call","m","c","d","name","getter","o","Object","defineProperty","enumerable","get","r","Symbol","toStringTag","value","t","mode","__esModule","ns","create","key","bind","n","object","property","prototype","hasOwnProperty","p","s","__webpack_exports__","divideNumbers","hasComma","isFloat","decimalPlaces","counterUp","el","options","arguments","length","undefined","_options$action","action","_options$duration","duration","_options$delay","delay","_options$lang","lang","stopCountUp","test","innerHTML","nums","getAttribute","document","querySelector","_countUpOrigInnerHTML","style","visibility","countUpTimeout","setTimeout","output","shift","clearTimeout","num","_options$duration2","_options$delay2","_options$lang2","divisions","splitValues","toString","split","k","push","isComma","replace","val","newNum","parseInt","parseFloat","toFixed","toLocaleString"],"mappings":"CAAA,SAAAA,EAAAC,GACA,iBAAAC,SAAA,iBAAAC,OACAA,OAAAD,QAAAD,IACA,mBAAAG,eAAAC,IACAD,OAAA,GAAAH,GACA,iBAAAC,QACAA,QAAA,UAAAD,IAEAD,EAAA,UAAAC,IARA,CASCK,OAAA,WACD,mBCTA,IAAAC,EAAA,GAGA,SAAAC,EAAAC,GAGA,GAAAF,EAAAE,GACA,OAAAF,EAAAE,GAAAP,QAGA,IAAAC,EAAAI,EAAAE,GAAA,CACAC,EAAAD,EACAE,GAAA,EACAT,QAAA,IAUA,OANAU,EAAAH,GAAAI,KAAAV,EAAAD,QAAAC,IAAAD,QAAAM,GAGAL,EAAAQ,GAAA,EAGAR,EAAAD,QA0DA,OArDAM,EAAAM,EAAAF,EAGAJ,EAAAO,EAAAR,EAGAC,EAAAQ,EAAA,SAAAd,EAAAe,EAAAC,GACAV,EAAAW,EAAAjB,EAAAe,IACAG,OAAAC,eAAAnB,EAAAe,EAAA,CAA0CK,YAAA,EAAAC,IAAAL,KAK1CV,EAAAgB,EAAA,SAAAtB,GACA,oBAAAuB,eAAAC,aACAN,OAAAC,eAAAnB,EAAAuB,OAAAC,YAAA,CAAwDC,MAAA,WAExDP,OAAAC,eAAAnB,EAAA,cAAiDyB,OAAA,KAQjDnB,EAAAoB,EAAA,SAAAD,EAAAE,GAEA,GADA,EAAAA,IAAAF,EAAAnB,EAAAmB,IACA,EAAAE,EAAA,OAAAF,EACA,KAAAE,GAAA,iBAAAF,QAAAG,WAAA,OAAAH,EACA,IAAAI,EAAAX,OAAAY,OAAA,MAGA,GAFAxB,EAAAgB,EAAAO,GACAX,OAAAC,eAAAU,EAAA,WAAyCT,YAAA,EAAAK,UACzC,EAAAE,GAAA,iBAAAF,EAAA,QAAAM,KAAAN,EAAAnB,EAAAQ,EAAAe,EAAAE,EAAA,SAAAA,GAAgH,OAAAN,EAAAM,IAAqBC,KAAA,KAAAD,IACrI,OAAAF,GAIAvB,EAAA2B,EAAA,SAAAhC,GACA,IAAAe,EAAAf,KAAA2B,WACA,WAA2B,OAAA3B,EAAA,SAC3B,WAAiC,OAAAA,GAEjC,OADAK,EAAAQ,EAAAE,EAAA,IAAAA,GACAA,GAIAV,EAAAW,EAAA,SAAAiB,EAAAC,GAAsD,OAAAjB,OAAAkB,UAAAC,eAAA1B,KAAAuB,EAAAC,IAGtD7B,EAAAgC,EAAA,GAIAhC,IAAAiC,EAAA,kCClFAjC,EAAAgB,EAAAkB,GAAAlC,EAAAQ,EAAA0B,EAAA,kCAAAC,IAAAnC,EAAAQ,EAAA0B,EAAA,6BAAAE,IAAApC,EAAAQ,EAAA0B,EAAA,4BAAAG,IAAArC,EAAAQ,EAAA0B,EAAA,kCAAAI,IAgDeC,UAhDG,SAAEC,GAAsB,IAAlBC,EAAkBC,UAAAC,OAAA,QAAAC,IAAAF,UAAA,GAAAA,UAAA,GAAR,GAAQG,EAOlCJ,EAJAK,cAHkCF,IAAAC,EAGzB,QAHyBA,EAAAE,EAOlCN,EAHAO,gBAJkCJ,IAAAG,EAIvB,IAJuBA,EAAAE,EAOlCR,EAFAS,aALkCN,IAAAK,EAK1B,GAL0BA,EAAAE,EAOlCV,EADAW,YANkCR,IAAAO,OAM3BP,EAN2BO,EAUtC,GAAgB,SAAXL,GAQR,GAHAO,EAAab,GAGN,QAAQc,KAAMd,EAAGe,WAAxB,CAIG,IAAMC,EAAOrB,EAAeK,EAAGe,UAAW,CACtCP,SAAUA,GAAYR,EAAGiB,aAAc,iBACvCL,KAAMA,GAAQM,SAASC,cAAe,QAASF,aAAc,cAAYb,EACzEM,MAAOA,GAASV,EAAGiB,aAAc,gBAIxCjB,EAAGoB,sBAAwBpB,EAAGe,UAG9Bf,EAAGe,UAAYC,EAAM,GACrBhB,EAAGqB,MAAMC,WAAa,UAYtBtB,EAAGuB,eAAiBC,WATL,SAATC,IACLzB,EAAGe,UAAYC,EAAKU,QACfV,EAAKb,QACTwB,aAAc3B,EAAGuB,gBACjBvB,EAAGuB,eAAiBC,WAAYC,EAAQf,IAExCV,EAAGoB,2BAAwBhB,GAGWM,SAlCjCG,EAAab,IAuCrB,IAAMa,EAAc,SAAAb,GAChB2B,aAAc3B,EAAGuB,gBACZvB,EAAGoB,wBACJpB,EAAGe,UAAYf,EAAGoB,sBAClBpB,EAAGoB,2BAAwBhB,GAE/BJ,EAAGqB,MAAMC,WAAa,IAGb3B,EAAgB,SAAEiC,GAkB9B,IAlBqD,IAAlB3B,EAAkBC,UAAAC,OAAA,QAAAC,IAAAF,UAAA,GAAAA,UAAA,GAAR,GAAQ2B,EAM9C5B,EAHAO,gBAH8CJ,IAAAyB,EAGnC,IAHmCA,EAAAC,EAM9C7B,EAFAS,aAJ8CN,IAAA0B,EAItC,GAJsCA,EAAAC,EAM9C9B,EADAW,YAL8CR,IAAA2B,OAKvC3B,EALuC2B,EAS/CC,EAAYxB,EAAWE,EAGpBuB,EAAcL,EAAIM,WAAWC,MAAO,kCAGvCnB,EAAO,GAGHoB,EAAI,EAAGA,EAAIJ,EAAWI,IAC/BpB,EAAKqB,KAAM,IAIZ,IAAM,IAAI3E,EAAI,EAAGA,EAAIuE,EAAY9B,OAAQzC,IAExC,GAAK,yBAAyBoD,KAAMmB,EAAavE,MAAW,UAAUoD,KAAMmB,EAAavE,IAAQ,CAChG,IAAIkE,EAAMK,EAAavE,GAGjB4E,EAAU,gBAAgBxB,KAAMc,GAGtCA,EAAMA,EAAIW,QAAS,KAAM,IAYzB,IATA,IAAM1C,EAAU,mBAAmBiB,KAAMc,GAGnC9B,EAAgBD,GAAY+B,EAAIO,MAAO,KAAO,IAAO,IAAKhC,OAAS,EAGrEiC,EAAIpB,EAAKb,OAAS,EAGZqC,EAAMR,EAAWQ,GAAO,EAAGA,IAAQ,CAChC,IAAIC,EAASC,SAAUd,EAAMI,EAAYQ,EAAK,IAGrD3C,IACJ4C,EAASE,WAAYf,EAAMI,EAAYQ,GAAMI,QAAS9C,GACtD2C,EAASE,WAAYF,GAASI,eAAgBjC,IAI1C0B,IACJG,EAASA,EAAOI,eAAgBjC,IAIjCI,EAAMoB,MAASK,QAIhB,IAAM,IAAIL,EAAI,EAAGA,EAAIJ,EAAWI,IAC/BpB,EAAMoB,IAAOH,EAAavE,GAQ1B,OAFAsD,EAAMA,EAAKb,QAAWyB,EAAIM,WAEnBlB,GAGEpB,EAAW,SAAAgC,GAAG,MAAI,gBAAgBd,KAAMc,IAExC/B,EAAU,SAAA+B,GAAG,MAAI,mBAAmBd,KAAMc,IAE1C9B,EAAgB,SAAA8B,GAAG,OAAI/B,EAAS+B,IAAUA,EAAIO,MAAO,KAAO,IAAO,IAAKhC,OAAS","file":"index.js","sourcesContent":["(function webpackUniversalModuleDefinition(root, factory) {\n\tif(typeof exports === 'object' && typeof module === 'object')\n\t\tmodule.exports = factory();\n\telse if(typeof define === 'function' && define.amd)\n\t\tdefine([], factory);\n\telse if(typeof exports === 'object')\n\t\texports[\"counterUp\"] = factory();\n\telse\n\t\troot[\"counterUp\"] = factory();\n})(window, function() {\nreturn "," \t// The module cache\n \tvar installedModules = {};\n\n \t// The require function\n \tfunction __webpack_require__(moduleId) {\n\n \t\t// Check if module is in cache\n \t\tif(installedModules[moduleId]) {\n \t\t\treturn installedModules[moduleId].exports;\n \t\t}\n \t\t// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)\n \t\tvar module = installedModules[moduleId] = {\n \t\t\ti: moduleId,\n \t\t\tl: false,\n \t\t\texports: {}\n \t\t};\n\n \t\t// Execute the module function\n \t\tmodules[moduleId].call(module.exports, module, module.exports, __webpack_require__);\n\n \t\t// Flag the module as loaded\n \t\tmodule.l = true;\n\n \t\t// Return the exports of the module\n \t\treturn module.exports;\n \t}\n\n\n \t// expose the modules object (__webpack_modules__)\n \t__webpack_require__.m = modules;\n\n \t// expose the module cache\n \t__webpack_require__.c = installedModules;\n\n \t// define getter function for harmony exports\n \t__webpack_require__.d = function(exports, name, getter) {\n \t\tif(!__webpack_require__.o(exports, name)) {\n \t\t\tObject.defineProperty(exports, name, { enumerable: true, get: getter });\n \t\t}\n \t};\n\n \t// define __esModule on exports\n \t__webpack_require__.r = function(exports) {\n \t\tif(typeof Symbol !== 'undefined' && Symbol.toStringTag) {\n \t\t\tObject.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: 'Module' });\n \t\t}\n \t\tObject.defineProperty(exports, '__esModule', { value: true });\n \t};\n\n \t// create a fake namespace object\n \t// mode & 1: value is a module id, require it\n \t// mode & 2: merge all properties of value into the ns\n \t// mode & 4: return value when already ns object\n \t// mode & 8|1: behave like require\n \t__webpack_require__.t = function(value, mode) {\n \t\tif(mode & 1) value = __webpack_require__(value);\n \t\tif(mode & 8) return value;\n \t\tif((mode & 4) && typeof value === 'object' && value && value.__esModule) return value;\n \t\tvar ns = Object.create(null);\n \t\t__webpack_require__.r(ns);\n \t\tObject.defineProperty(ns, 'default', { enumerable: true, value: value });\n \t\tif(mode & 2 && typeof value != 'string') for(var key in value) __webpack_require__.d(ns, key, function(key) { return value[key]; }.bind(null, key));\n \t\treturn ns;\n \t};\n\n \t// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-harmony modules\n \t__webpack_require__.n = function(module) {\n \t\tvar getter = module && module.__esModule ?\n \t\t\tfunction getDefault() { return module['default']; } :\n \t\t\tfunction getModuleExports() { return module; };\n \t\t__webpack_require__.d(getter, 'a', getter);\n \t\treturn getter;\n \t};\n\n \t// Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call\n \t__webpack_require__.o = function(object, property) { return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(object, property); };\n\n \t// __webpack_public_path__\n \t__webpack_require__.p = \"\";\n\n\n \t// Load entry module and return exports\n \treturn __webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = 0);\n","const counterUp = ( el, options = {} ) => {\n\n const { \n action = 'start', \n duration = 1000, \n delay = 16, \n lang = undefined \n } = options\n\n // Allow people to use this as a stop method.\n if ( action === 'stop' ) {\n stopCountUp( el )\n return\n }\n\n\tstopCountUp( el )\n\n\t// If no number, don't do anything.\n\tif ( ! /[0-9]/.test( el.innerHTML ) ) {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n const nums = divideNumbers( el.innerHTML, { \n duration: duration || el.getAttribute( 'data-duration' ),\n lang: lang || document.querySelector( 'html' ).getAttribute( 'lang' ) || undefined,\n delay: delay || el.getAttribute( 'data-delay' ),\n } )\n\n\t// Remember the contents.\n\tel._countUpOrigInnerHTML = el.innerHTML\n\n // Start counting.\n\tel.innerHTML = nums[ 0 ]\n\tel.style.visibility = 'visible'\n\n\t// Function for displaying output with the set time and delay.\n\tconst output = function() {\n\t\tel.innerHTML = nums.shift()\n\t\tif ( nums.length ) {\n\t\t\tclearTimeout( el.countUpTimeout )\n\t\t\tel.countUpTimeout = setTimeout( output, delay )\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tel._countUpOrigInnerHTML = undefined\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tel.countUpTimeout = setTimeout( output, delay )\n}\n\nexport default counterUp\n\nconst stopCountUp = el => {\n clearTimeout( el.countUpTimeout )\n if ( el._countUpOrigInnerHTML ) {\n el.innerHTML = el._countUpOrigInnerHTML\n el._countUpOrigInnerHTML = undefined\n }\n el.style.visibility = ''\n}\n\nexport const divideNumbers = ( num, options = {} ) => {\n\n const { \n duration = 1000, \n delay = 16, \n lang = undefined \n } = options\n\n\t// Number of times the number will change.\n\tconst divisions = duration / delay\n\n\t// Split numbers and html tags.\n const splitValues = num.toString().split( /(<[^>]+>|[0-9.][,.0-9]*[0-9]*)/ )\n\n\t// Contains all numbers to be displayed.\n\tconst nums = []\n\n\t// Set blank strings to ready the split values.\n\tfor ( let k = 0; k < divisions; k++ ) {\n\t\tnums.push( '' )\n\t}\n\n\t// Loop through all numbers and html tags.\n\tfor ( let i = 0; i < splitValues.length; i++ ) {\n\t\t// If number split it into smaller numbers and insert it to nums.\n\t\tif ( /([0-9.][,.0-9]*[0-9]*)/.test( splitValues[ i ] ) && ! /<[^>]+>/.test( splitValues[ i ] ) ) {\n\t\t\tlet num = splitValues[ i ]\n\n\t\t\t// Test if numbers have comma.\n\t\t\tconst isComma = /[0-9]+,[0-9]+/.test( num )\n\n\t\t\t// Remove comma for computation purposes.\n\t\t\tnum = num.replace( /,/g, '' )\n\n\t\t\t// Test if values have point.\n\t\t\tconst isFloat = /^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$/.test( num )\n\n\t\t\t// Check number of decimals places.\n\t\t\tconst decimalPlaces = isFloat ? ( num.split( '.' )[ 1 ] || [] ).length : 0\n\n\t\t\t// Start adding numbers from the end.\n\t\t\tlet k = nums.length - 1\n\n\t\t\t// Create small numbers\n\t\t\tfor ( let val = divisions; val >= 1; val-- ) {\n let newNum = parseInt( num / divisions * val, 10 )\n\n\t\t\t\t// If has decimal point, add it again.\n\t\t\t\tif ( isFloat ) {\n\t\t\t\t\tnewNum = parseFloat( num / divisions * val ).toFixed( decimalPlaces )\n\t\t\t\t\tnewNum = parseFloat( newNum ).toLocaleString( lang )\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// If has comma, add it again.\n\t\t\t\tif ( isComma ) {\n\t\t\t\t\tnewNum = newNum.toLocaleString( lang )\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// Insert all small numbers.\n\t\t\t\tnums[ k-- ] += newNum\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Insert all non-numbers in the same place.\n\t\t\tfor ( let k = 0; k < divisions; k++ ) {\n\t\t\t\tnums[ k ] += splitValues[ i ]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// The last value of the element should be the original one.\n nums[ nums.length ] = num.toString()\n \n return nums\n}\n\nexport const hasComma = num => /[0-9]+,[0-9]+/.test( num )\n\nexport const isFloat = num => /^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$/.test( num )\n\nexport const decimalPlaces = num => isFloat( num ) ? ( num.split( '.' )[ 1 ] || [] ).length : 0"],"sourceRoot":""}
